search.placeholder: Search projects, orgs, datasets, assets, files…

settings.searchableHint: Off = invisible: not shown in user search, but can still be invited by ID

resourceGrants.title: Collaborators
resourceGrants.desc: Grant project members specific actions (added on top of their role). Project Managers only.
resourceGrants.matrixDesc: Tick to allow that action on top of the member's role; untick to revoke. Actions already covered by the member's role are shown locked.
resourceGrants.fromRole: From member role (can't be revoked here)

error.unauthorized: Session expired, please sign in again
